name: Pastichio (Greek Lasagna)
recipeInstructions:
1. Par-boil the ziti and drain.
2. Brown the chopped meat with half a stick of butter and tomato paste in a pan. Add salt and pepper.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (except eggs) to the pan and let the mixture cool completely.
4. Stir in the eggs.
5. Grease a 13x9 inch baking dish and pour the mixture (with ziti) into the dish.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 60 minutes or until lightly browned.
